title: fragariastrum ulrichii
intro: Fragariastrum ulrichii, also known as the "Mountain Strawberry Tree" or "Taiwan Strawberry Tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Fragariastrum ulrichii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Fragariastrum ulrichii include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
